creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: joneum
Date: Thu Mar 19 15:09:44 UTC 2020
New revision: 528727
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/528727

Log:
  Update to 0.6.0

  Changelog:

  0.6.0:
  -Add constLabels support via cli arg/env variable.

  0.5.0:
  -Set user agent on scrape requests to nginx.
  -Add ability to scrape and listen on unix domain sockets.
  -Add location zone and resolver metric support.
  -Fix typo in stream_zone_sync_status_nodes_online metric description.
  -Do not assume default datasource in Grafana panels.
  -Set correct nginx_up query and instance variable expression.

  PR:		244896
  Reported by:	Volodymyr Kostyrko <arcade@b1t.name> (maintainer)
  Sponsored by:	Netzkommune GmbH

Changes:
  head/www/nginx-prometheus-exporter/Makefile
  head/www/nginx-prometheus-exporter/distinfo
